column1: #   factory   — minimal recovery image (BLE + WiFi + MQTT + OTA only
#               Write-protected in eFuse after manufacturing flash.
#               Boots if both OTA partitions are corrupt/invalid.
#   ota_1     — staging slot for OTA updates.
#   nvs_keys  — NVS encryption keys partition (AES-256 XTS).
#               Generated per-device at factory; never readable after first write.
#   Backend pushes cmd → toy downloads to inactive slot → SHA256 verify →
#   Remaining: ~3.4MB unallocated (available for SPIFFS or future expansion)
